title: Knarfy's Terrible Commands
description: Terrible commands suggested by viewers for Knarfy's video!
body:
# Knarfy's Terrible Commands
A collection of very cursed and random commands suggested by viewers for Knarfy's video!

### Check out the original video here: 
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gSGr5jkGWtg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Commands included:
- `/baby` - Turns mobs and players into baby versions of themselves (players can ride chickens)
- `/unbaby` - Turns mobs and players back into adult versions of themselves
- `/cat` - Spawns a potato (thank you That_Chief_Guy)
- `/win` - Gives you OP armor, a dragon egg, and every advancement
- `/clutch` - Teleports you really high up with a random clutch item to save yourself!
- `/disintegrate <entity>` - Causes the world around targeted entity to disintegrate slowly
- `/pain <entity>` - Sets entity's maximum health to 1 hp (half a heart)
- `/beans` - Spawns beans (renamed resin block)
- `/cows` - Spawns cows, ghost cows, and rarely a mooshroom!
- `/chicken` - Spawns 500 chicken jockeys
- `/mob` - 50% chance to spawn a random mob, 50% chance to become a random mob
- `/knarfy` - Turns you into Knarfy. Chat messages say a familiar phrase!
- `/unknarfy` - Returns you to your normal self.
- `/chaos` - self explanitory
- `/judge <player>` - 50% chance to ascend and become an angel, 50% chance for not that...
- `/straightdown <entities>` - Digs a 3x3 hole directly beneath their feet to the void
- `/unsub` - SystemZee will see you now.
